DocumentationNarrative.Body: `meta-datavault-business` creates sanctioned business Data Vault workspaces for modeling business-oriented vault structures.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Required. Directory where the empty MetaBusinessDataVault workspace will be created.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business hub to an ordered bridge path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a business link to an ordered bridge path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add a hierarchical link satellite attribute.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional. Length datatype facet authored as metadata.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary
